items.title: Build a custom HLS player in React with hls.js (no wrapper libraries)
items.description:
TL;DR

We'll build a custom HLS player on top of hls.js 1.6.x and React 19 with no wrapper library. Play/pause, seek, volume, quality readout, buffer state, and proper error recovery. End result is ~150 lines and bends to whatever UI you want.

📦 Code: g

items.title: Pick a better video thumbnail automatically with FFmpeg, PySceneDetect, and CLIP
items.description:
TL;DR

We'll build a pipeline that takes any video file, extracts candidate frames with FFmpeg and PySceneDetect, filters out blurry ones with OpenCV, scores each candidate with OpenCLIP against a small prompt set, and picks the top-K thumbnails with a diversity constraint.
